entries.name: Cell
entries.code:
Cell = object
  text*: string
  width*, row*, col*, ncols*, nrows*: int

entries.name: parseTableCells
entries.code:
iterator parseTableCells(s: string; delim = '\t'): Cell {.raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
entries.description: Iterates over all cells in a delim-delimited s, after a 1st pass that computes number of rows, columns, and width of each column.

entries.name: alignTable
entries.code:
proc alignTable(s: string; delim = '\t'; fill = ' '; sep = " "): string {.
    raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: Formats a delim-delimited s representing a table; each cell is aligned to a width that's computed for each column; consecutive columns are delimited by sep, and alignment space is filled using fill. More customized formatting can be done by calling parseTableCells directly.
